title: Jiayong
description: Jiayong Liang is an Assistant Professor of Practice in Environmental Studies at NYU Shanghai. As a geographer and spatial data scientist, Jiayong applies remote sensing techniques to identify, quantify, and model the Earth's natural resources and environment for human well-being. Her work has
